item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers (#1049)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.

item.title: Garmin Cirqa: Everything Known About The Whoop Rival So Far
item.description: It may just be weeks away, and the Garmin Cirqa represents a new style of more lifestyle-friendly wearable for the hardcore fitness brand.

item.title: A Big Update About ‘Running Point’ Season 3 On Netflix
item.description: Will Running Point get a season 3? There's an update on that front from the showrunner, now that season 2 is here.

item.title: You Can't Paddle Into A 100-Foot Wave. You Can't Incrementally Adopt AI, Either.
item.description: Big wave surfers didn't ride 60-foot waves by paddling harder — they invented tow-in surfing. Enterprise AI adoption requires the same categorical shi...

item.title: Quordle Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.
